**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Kecheng Technology Co., Ltd. presents a severe case of registry misclassification, existing as an active but highly fragmented corporate conglomerate/shell rather than an electronics manufacturer. The 'Apple Inc.' hallucination has been completely eradicated. Although officially categorized under 'Computer and Electronic Equipment Manufacturing' with a massive 16 Million RMB paid-in capital, its physical footprint contradicts this: it maintains a micro-workforce of only 10 insured employees. The critical revelation lies in its bizarre, omnibus business scope, which includes 'accommodation services', 'interior decoration', 'power generation', 'software development', 'landscaping', and 'real estate leasing'. This explicitly confirms the entity is not a focused manufacturing plant. Instead, the 'Kecheng Group' (noted in its URL) utilizes this highly capitalized entity as a master holding shell or bidding SPV to pursue diverse local engineering, property management, and municipal IT projects in Nanjing, devoid of any heavy manufacturing capacity.
